sections.label: Technique
sections.placeholder: Multidetector CT of the coronary arteries acquired without intravenous contrast. Multiplanar reformats reviewed. State kVp/contrast volume/phase and DLP as per local dose policy.

sections.label: Comparison
sections.placeholder: Date and type of relevant prior imaging, if available.

sections.label: Findings
sections.placeholder:
Coronary dominance: 
Per-vessel calcification (left main, LAD, LCx, RCA): 
Total Agatston calcium score and age/sex percentile (CAC=0 vs 1–99 vs 100–399 vs ≥400; risk category): 
Plaque burden inference (CAD-RADS 2.0 P1–P4 from calcium extent — note luminal stenosis is not assessable on a non-contrast calcium study): 
Extracoronary / aortic-valve calcification: 
Cardiac chambers / pericardium (non-gated detail as visualised):

sections.label: Impression
sections.placeholder: Concise, prioritised bulleted impression. Lead with the total Agatston calcium score, its risk category and age/sex percentile, and the CAD-RADS 2.0 plaque-burden category (P1–P4) it implies; state that luminal stenosis is not graded on a non-contrast study, and close with approved follow-up phrasing only.

sections.label: Recommendations
sections.placeholder: Evidence-based follow-up or correlation, drawn from approved phrasing, only if indicated.
